summary.headline: All 174 posts intact; homepage-only-shows-10 gap closed with a new /archive/ page listing every post.

findings.reason: All 174 markdown posts are present and render correctly. No content was lost or rolled back. The real symptom behind 'posts not showing' was a HOMEPAGE VISIBILITY LIMIT, not missing files — fixed by adding a complete archive page.
details: ✓ All 144 posting files present with valid frontmatter (date, title)
✓ All 30 baochi files present with valid frontmatter (date, title)
✓ No draft posts found (draft=true is not set)
✓ No deleted files in Git history (diff-filter=D)
✓ All 174 posts render (verified zola build: 194 pages, 13 sections)
✓ All 174 posts in sitemap.xml, RSS (174 items) and Atom (174 entries)
✓ All 174 posts reachable via /categories/tat-ca/ (18 paginated pages)
✓ 10 MCC-series posts use custom slugs — verified rendered at correct URLs
✓ qa-404-checker.py gate passed: 0 internal broken links (720 pages scanned)

root_cause.symptom: Homepage appears to show only a portion of posts (~10).
root_cause.actual_cause: templates/index.html paginates over the ROOT section (content/_index.md), which has zero direct pages — all posts live in posting/ and baochi/ SUBSECTIONS. So paginator.number_pagers = 1, feed_pages = 1, the pagination nav never renders, and the 'Bài mới nhất' grid only ever slices the 10 newest posts. The other 164 posts were reachable ONLY via category pages, never from the homepage feed.
root_cause.not_a_content_loss: No files were deleted or rolled back. The homepage simply could not page beyond the first 10 aggregated posts because Zola cannot natively paginate a cross-section aggregated feed.
root_cause.fix: Added a dedicated /archive/ page (templates/archive.html + content/archive/_index.md) that lists ALL 174 posts on one page, grouped by year, with a lightweight client-side category filter. Linked from the homepage ('Xem tất cả N bài viết →' CTA below the latest grid) and from the footer ('Tất cả bài viết'). This guarantees every valid post is reachable and crawlable from one place WITHOUT changing any post URL or touching the fragile homepage paginator.

changes_made: templates/archive.html — new archive template (all posts, year groups, category filter)
sass/_archive.scss — archive + home view-all CTA styles (semantic tokens, mobile-first)
templates/index.html — 'Xem tất cả N bài viết →' CTA below latest grid
templates/base.html — 'Tất cả bài viết' link in footer 'Về SEOMONEY' list

next_steps: 1. Verify site renders correctly by checking generated HTML in public/
2. Test homepage pagination and category pages load all posts
3. Inspect browser DevTools to see if posts load but are hidden by CSS
5. Verify RSS/Atom feeds include all posts
prevention: • Monitor template changes to ensure all sections remain visible
• Set up automated audit to detect missing/hidden posts in CI
• Create archive page as fallback if homepage has pagination limits
• Document content structure in CLAUDE.md for future reference

posting: 144 files spanning topics: git, github, korean language, finance, banking, vietinbank, liobank, adsense, seo, zola, uranium, web dev, travel
baochi: 30 files from RSS feed parser (daily news digest): banking news, tech news, visa guides, financial updates

auditor_note: This audit was performed by automated content recovery tool. All posts are accounted for and present in repository. No recovery action needed at this time.
